author: aarol
description: Highlights lines in code blocks using Hugo's hl_lines syntax.

manifest.author: aarol
manifest.description: Highlights lines in codeblocks using Hugo's hl_lines syntax.
manifest.name: Hugo codeblock highlight

name: Hugo codeblock highlight

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
* Highlights can now be added / removed by selecting lines inside a codeblock and using the `Highlight selected lines` option in the right-click menu.
  * This will update the codeblock's `hl_lines` attribute, or insert the attribute automatically
* Mixed-case attributes (`hl_Lines`) are now parsed correctly.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: * Fixed the highlight lines not being visible when the "Code Styler" plugin is installed.
